name: Emergent
description: Builds production-ready full-stack apps from natural language with a team of coordinated AI agents. Syncs code to GitHub; connects Stripe, Supabase, and external APIs. $1.5B-valued.

skills.name: Full-Stack Generation
skills.description: Generates frontend, backend, database, and auth as real production-grade code from a natural-language prompt.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Build
skills.description: Coordinates architect, designer, developer, integration, and PM agents to plan, build, and debug the app.

skills.name: Deploy & Own
skills.description: Ships apps to containerized cloud infrastructure and syncs the code to your GitHub repo for full ownership.
